records.ety: [L. comminutus, p. p. of comminuere to comminute; com- + minuere to lessen. See Minute.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Comminuted; p. pr. & vb. n. Comminuting.]

defs: To reduce to minute particles, or to a fine powder; to pulverize; to triturate; to grind; as, to comminute chalk or bones; to comminute food with the teeth.
